title: Kenyan-Style Vegan Chickpea Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan stir fry recipe inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring chickpeas as the main ingredient.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper, cook for 3-4 minutes or until tender.
Add the tomato, cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, rich, and a pinch of salt. Stir well to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
